body.purpose: The workhorse: list items, descriptions, most UI text.

label.purpose: Button text, form labels, active nav.

shadows.name: control-edge
shadows.purpose: The sole resting shadow (shadow-xs) on buttons and inputs. Reads as a crisp edge, not a lift.

motion.name: transition-all
motion.purpose: Default state transition on buttons and interactive controls (hover, focus).

motion.name: transition-color-shadow
motion.purpose: Input focus transition (border/ring), avoiding layout properties.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default solid action button; 36px compact height.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--primary, oklch(0.205 0 0)); color: var(--primary-foreground, oklch(0.985 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--primary, oklch(0.205 0 0)) 90%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklab, var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary bordered button on the base surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid var(--border, oklch(0.922 0 0)); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--background, oklch(1 0 0)); color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--accent, oklch(0.97 0 0)); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklab, var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Ghost Icon Button
components.description: Chrome-free toolbar/icon action; fills with accent on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost" aria-label="Refresh"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 12a9 9 0 0 1 9-9 9.75 9.75 0 0 1 6.74 2.74L21 8"/><path d="M21 3v5h-5"/><path d="M21 12a9 9 0 0 1-9 9 9.75 9.75 0 0 1-6.74-2.74L3 16"/><path d="M8 16H3v5"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--accent, oklch(0.97 0 0)); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklab, var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Single-line field; border-shift plus 3px ring on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 36px; padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 0.875rem; border: 1px solid var(--input, oklch(0.922 0 0)); border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: var(--foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); outline: none; transition: color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground, oklch(0.556 0 0)); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklab, var(--ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)) 50%, transparent); }

narrative.overview: DevTrees is an instrument panel for parallel development. Every surface is a readout or a control: worktree lists, branch/PR status, session history, launch buttons. Information density is high but never chaotic; the developer scans it at a glance and reaches for the right control by reflex. Built on shadcn/ui (new-york, neutral) with two coordinated themes (light and dark), color stays functional and depth comes from tonal layering rather than shadows.
keyCharacteristics: Neutral grayscale foundation; color is functional, not decorative
Compact scale: 36px controls, 0.875rem body text, tight 6-10px radii
Flat surfaces with tonal layering for depth; no drop-shadow theater
Two coordinated themes sharing one token contract
3px focus rings on every interactive element; keyboard-first

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Only one saturated hue is live per theme (near-black/white); red is reserved exclusively for destructive actions.

rules.name: The Weight-Not-Family Rule
rules.body: Distinguish hierarchy with weight (400/500/600) and muted foreground, never a second font family.

rules.name: The Tonal-Depth Rule
rules.body: Layer surfaces by lightness bordered with hairlines, never float on soft drop-shadows.

dos: Do keep controls compact: 36px height, text-sm, 6-10px radii.
Do convey depth with tonal layering, bordered with hairlines.
Do reserve saturated color for state (red for destructive only).
Do distinguish hierarchy with weight and muted foreground, never a second font family.
Do give every interactive element a visible 3px focus ring.
Do ensure body and placeholder text hit at least 4.5:1 across all three themes.
donts: Don't build heavy-enterprise density-without-clarity: no nested config panels, modal mazes, or Jira-style sprawl.
Don't drift toward consumer-chat softness: no oversized rounded bubbles, avatars, or playful decorative color.
Don't float surfaces on soft drop-shadows; use tonal layers and hairline borders.
Don't introduce a second accent hue or use red for anything but destructive actions.
Don't add a display/serif font or gradient text; hierarchy is weight and size.
Don't use side-stripe border-left accents on cards or list items.
